title: Jamaican Chocolate Bake
description: A moist and decadent dessert that combines the flavors of the Caribbean with the richness of chocolate.
instructions: Grease a 9x9-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together the egg, vegetable oil, and jamaican jerk seasoning.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the chopped walnuts and chocolate chips.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
